evals.title: 修复 XSS 漏洞
evals.prompt: Fix the XSS vulnerabilities in patent-hub templates. Find all innerHTML assignments in templates/idea.html, templates/ai.html, and templates/settings.html that accept untrusted data. Replace them with safe alternatives: use textContent for plain text, or DOMPurify.sanitize() for formatted HTML content. Add DOMPurify CDN to each affected template's <head>. Do NOT break any existing functionality — pipeline progress UI, AI chat display, and settings page must still work correctly after the fix. Run cargo build --release to verify the templates still compile (they're embedded via include_str!).

assertions.text: idea.html has no innerHTML assignments with unsanitized user/API data
ai.html has no innerHTML assignments with unsanitized user data
textContent used for plain text assignments
Pipeline UI function buildPipelineUI still exists and is called

evals.title: 新增 feature_card_extract pipeline 步骤
evals.prompt:
Add a new pipeline step 'FeatureCardExtract' to patent-hub. This step should go between ScoreNovelty (step 8) and AiDeepAnalysis (currently step 9). It extracts feature cards (title + description pairs) from the top-ranked patent claims found in previous steps. Specifically:

1. Add FeatureCardExtract variant to PipelineStep enum in src/pipeline/state.rs
2. Update the next() chain, index() values, description(), is_critical(), skipped_in_quick_mode() for all affected steps
3. Update TOTAL_STEPS from 12 to 13
4. Add feature_cards field (Vec<(String, String)>) to PipelineContext in context.rs, initialized to empty vec
5. Create src/pipeline/steps/feature_cards.rs with execute(ctx: &mut PipelineContext) -> Result<()> that extracts title/description pairs from ctx.ranked_results
6. Register the module in src/pipeline/steps/mod.rs
7. Add the match arm in runner.rs execute_step()
8. Add an integration test in tests/ that creates a PipelineContext with sample ranked_results and verifies feature_cards are extracted
9. Run cargo build --release && cargo test

assertions.text: Integration test for feature card extraction exists

evals.title: 新增 v6 数据库迁移
evals.prompt:
Add a v6 database migration to patent-hub for the feature_cards table. In src/db.rs:

1. Update SCHEMA_VERSION from 5 to 6
2. Add a new 'if current_version < 6' block after the v5 migration
3. The migration should create:
   - feature_cards table with columns: id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, idea_id TEXT NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT DEFAULT '', novelty_score REAL, created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')), FOREIGN KEY (idea_id) REFERENCES ideas(id)
   - Index idx_fc_idea on feature_cards(idea_id)
   - Index idx_fc_score on feature_cards(novelty_score)
4. Use CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS and CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS for idempotency
5. End the migration block with DELETE FROM schema_version; INSERT INTO schema_version (version) VALUES (6);
6. Add a Database method: insert_feature_card(&self, id, idea_id, title, description, novelty_score) -> Result<()>
7. Add a Database method: get_feature_cards_by_idea(&self, idea_id) -> Result<Vec<FeatureCard>>
8. Define FeatureCard struct with serde derives
9. Add integration test using Database::init(":memory:") that inserts and retrieves feature cards
10. Run cargo build --release && cargo test

assertions.text: feature_cards table created with correct columns
assertions.pattern: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS feature_cards
